title: South Korea's oldest crypto exchange is now part of the $1 trillion Mirae Group family
summary: Korbit, South Korea's first cryptocurrency exchange, has joined the Mirae Asset Group family, marking the first time a traditional Korean financial group's affiliate has taken a controlling stake in a domestic crypto exchange.

title: Bitcoin, Ethereum-linked protocols lose $35 million in multiple attacks hours apart
summary: The attacks hit Verus, B² Network and other cross-chain systems, showing how compromised keys, upgrade powers and validation checks can empty protocols without breaking the underlying cryptography.

title: Arbitrum-based AFX Trade drained of $24 million after bridge keys compromised
summary: Security firms said the attacker used enough hot-validator signatures to approve a 24.15 million USDC withdrawal, while Arbitrum said its native bridge was not affected.

title: XRP whales accumulate as small holders capitulate
summary: XRP whales accumulate 2.8% more tokens over five weeks as small holders capitulate, sending the price back above $1.16.

title: Bitcoin wilts as oil and rates rise. Clarity Act odds tumble to 38%
summary: Geopolitical risks, rising rates, and fresh regulatory setbacks send crypto lower as key Democrats demand stronger safeguards in the market structure bill.
